name: Mane 7 (Interrogate [You])
description:
"Fluttershy, waterboard this bozo."

(You) are a villain, and the mane 7 dislike the fact you're a villain, so they bring you in for questioning. I made this for personal reasons a few weeks ago, but whatever, I might as well dump it.

Scenario 1 and 2 are similar - the difference is scenario 1 has you caught while terrorising Ponyville, and scenario 2 has you be a more... subtle villain.

The first of the final four.
creator: The Ruiner
